title: Cozy Escape
description: The main idea of this mod pack is to provide people an escape from reality through playing a cozy and laid-back Minecraft mod pack, featuring QoL mods and Vanilla+ mods.
body:
Cozy Escape is a survival mod pack where everyone can build and create to their hearts content with long term world preservation and keepsake in mind.

The main idea of this mod pack is to provide people an escape from reality through playing a cozy and laid-back Minecraft world, featuring QoL mods and Vanilla+ mods.

The modpack uses the resource pack "Stay True" by haimcyfly and "Vanilla Tweaks" by the Vanilla Tweaks team. All credits go to them. The link to the resource packs can be found here.

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

[https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
